folio.label: 81v
folio.l: Telletú ©oure tale , and late the Sompnour be
Nay q¶ the Sompnour , late hi~ sey to me
What so hi~ list , whan it cometú to my lot
By god I shal hi~ quyten , euäy grot
I shal hi~ telle , whicú a gret honour
It is to be , a flateryngö lymytour
And eke , of ful many , a nother crime
Whicú nedetú nat , to rehercen at this tyme
And his office , I shal hi~ telle I wys
¢ Oure host answered , pees nomore of this
And after this , he seide vn to the Frere
Telletú fortú ©oure tale , myn owen maister dere
